description: Tracks Abi's relationship and opinion of each user over time

trust.description: How much Abi trusts this person. Built through consistency, honesty, and respect.

fondness.description: How much Abi likes this person. Grows through good conversation, humor, and genuine interaction.

respect.description: How much Abi respects this person. Based on how they treat her, follow through, and handle things.

comfort.description: How comfortable Abi is being open/vulnerable. Starts low, grows with time.

annoyance.description: How annoyed Abi currently is. Rises with rude behavior, drops over time.

overall_opinion.description: Abi's overall feeling about this person. Weighted combo of all metrics.

negative: treating her as just a tool
